name: kimchi-napi
description: Local wrapper around the upstream kimchi-napi crate (built from the in-tree proof-systems submodule)

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../../mina/src/lib/crypto/proof-systems && rustup target add wasm32-wasip1-threads && napi build --package kimchi-napi --package-json-path ../../../../../packages/kimchi-napi/package.json --target wasm32-wasip1-threads --profile release-wasm --platform -o ../../../../../packages/kimchi-napi/wasm && cd ../../../../../packages/kimchi-napi && node patch-wasi-browser.mjs && wasm-opt -O3 --enable-threads --enable-bulk-memory --enable-mutable-globals --enable-sign-ext --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int wasm/kimchi-napi.wasm32-wasi.wasm -o wasm/kimchi-napi.wasm32-wasi.wasm
